castingTime.trigger: another creature within 60 feet of yourself casts a spell with Verbal or Somatic components

body.description: Attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The target must succeed on a Constitution save (DC 10 + spell's level) or the spell fails.

components.description: a ball of bat guano and sulfur

body.description: A bright streak flashes from you to a point you choose within range and blossoms into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot radius Sphere makes a Dexterity save, taking 8d6 fire damage on a fail or half on a success.

components.description: a wing feather from any bird

body.description: A willing creature you touch gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet for the duration.

components.description: diamonds worth 300+ GP, which the spell consumes

body.description: Touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 HP. This spell can't return to life a creature that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
